# HPD.ML.Core.ComposedTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Sequential composition of transforms. Produced by TransformComposer.Compose(). Schema propagation runs eagerly; data transformation runs lazily.

